rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers and component port names in type-level contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid, visible component features.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
Assignments in AGREE are placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts.
Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;` and constants with `const name : type = value;`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent ports in component type contracts.
Avoid using AADL property names like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
